description: Recurring code-health audit for {{repo}} ({{quarter}}). Walks DRY, SOLID, dead-code, and dependency-hygiene checks, capturing findings as child beads.

steps.title: Code-health audit: {{repo}} ({{quarter}})
steps.description: Umbrella for the {{quarter}} code-health audit of {{repo}}. File one bead per finding via the Bug Discovery Protocol; do NOT fix inline unless blocking.

steps.title: DRY scan: duplicated logic in {{repo}}
steps.description: Find copy-paste / near-duplicate logic. Tools: jscpd or rg for repeated blocks; eyeball helpers that should be shared. Output: list of duplication hotspots with file:line.

steps.title: SOLID review: responsibility & coupling in {{repo}}
steps.description: Look for SRP violations (god modules >600 lines), leaky abstractions, and tight coupling. Output: refactor candidates ranked by pain.

steps.title: Dead-code sweep: {{repo}}
steps.description: Detect unused functions/imports/templates. Tools: vulture (py), ruff F401, grep for unreferenced symbols. Output: removal candidates with confidence notes.

steps.title: Dependency hygiene: {{repo}}
steps.description: Audit deps: pinned vs floating, outdated, unused, security advisories. Tools: uv pip list --outdated, pip-audit. Output: upgrade/remove plan.
